narrative: Normal change request for production database failover patch. Risk assessment completed: moderate impact, low probability. CAB review and approval recorded 2026-05-19 by 7 voting members. Implementation plan documented with 12 explicit steps. Backout plan prepared with explicit decision point at 30 minutes post-deploy + designated owner (on-call DBA). Validation tests defined: 5 smoke tests + 3 dependency health probes + success criteria of p99 latency < 250ms. Stakeholder communication sent 72 hr in advance. Maintenance window 2026-05-21 02:00-04:00 UTC. Post-implementation review scheduled for 2026-05-22.
